report_text: NVDA is compared with AMD, AVGO, INTC, and QCOM on revenue growth, gross margin, operating margin, EV/EBITDA, P/E, and business mix. NVDA deserves a premium because of data center acceleration, CUDA ecosystem depth, and superior revenue growth, but the premium embeds execution risk and cyclicality. Recommendation: Hold because upside depends on sustained AI infrastructure demand and margins remaining elevated.
